headline: EPAM Announces Date for First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM), a leading digital transformation services and product engineering company, will host a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET, on Thursday, May 7, 2026, to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. A news release containing these results will be issued before the call.

headline: EPAM Special Meeting Dispute Meets Valuation Gap For Long Term Holders
summary: EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) has proposed amendments to its Certificate of Incorporation that address shareholder rights to call special meetings. The company is actively opposing a shareholder resolution that would allow stockholders holding 10% of shares to call special meetings. These governance changes are expected to be decided by investor votes at the 2026 Annual Meeting. EPAM Systems operates as a global provider of digital platform engineering and software development services, serving...
